posts.raw_content:
Nearly everyone says the fried potatoes are the best they have ever had.  I've had some good ones in Belgium, but I'm sure they were fried the same way.

Corn/canola/soybean oils are smaller molecules that work their way into the food and make it greasy.  Beef tallow  seems to stay near the surface and give the outside of the potato or chicken a real crunchy texture.  This can be done with seed oils using to different temperature fryers but it takes longer and costs more.

If you filter your beef tallow, it will last a long time, and probably cost less in the long run.  Most of it is there at the end of the day instead of having a few cups of canola oil disappear into the  food over the shift
posts.author: dukeofdoorcounty
posts.title: Our little restaurant has been open only a week, but the beef tallow fries and wings are a hit.

Beef tallow seems to stay near the surface and give the outside of the potato or chicken a real crunchy texture. This can be done with seed oils using to different temperature fryers but it takes longer and costs more.
